title: Conductor Configuration
description: Schema for conductor.json — the central configuration file for the Copilot conductor system.

trusted_directories.description: List of absolute directory paths that agents are permitted to operate in.

items.description: Absolute path to a trusted directory.

models.description: Model configuration for the conductor system.

authorized_models.description: List of model identifiers that agents are permitted to use.

default_model.description: The default model used when an agent does not specify its own. Must be present in authorized_models.

agent.description: Agent definitions. Each key is a role identifier (e.g. 'conductor', 'developer'). The 'conductor' role is required.

propertyNames.description: Role keys must be lowercase alphanumeric with optional hyphens.

name.description: Display name for this agent. Defaults to the role key if absent.

description.description: Human-readable description of the agent's purpose. Used to generate the agent file and its 'Use when:' discovery description.

active.description: Whether the agent is active for this session. Agents without this key or with active=false are skipped.

model.description: Optional model override for this agent. Falls back to models.default_model if absent.

sidekick.description: If true, this agent is the designated sidekick — always available for development tasks. Only one agent should have sidekick=true.

augmenting.description: If true, this agent augments the base copilot functionality rather than operating as a standalone agent.

scope.description: Operational scope for this agent. 'system' agents are global; 'project' agents are scoped to a specific project workspace.

instructions.description: Custom instructions for the agent to follow during execution. Used for agent-specific behavioral guidelines.

conductorAgent.description: Configuration for the conductor agent. Same fields as a regular agent but always treated as active.

name.description: Display name for the conductor agent (exposed as CONDUCTOR_AGENT_NAME).

description.description: Human-readable description of the conductor's role.

active.description: Always treated as true for the conductor. Included for consistency.

model.description: Optional model override. Falls back to models.default_model if absent.

scope.description: Operational scope for the conductor. 'system' agents are global; 'project' agents are scoped to a specific project workspace.

instancePolicy.description: Concurrency policy: minimum and optional maximum number of simultaneous agent instances.

min.description: Minimum number of instances that must be running.

max.description: Maximum number of concurrent instances allowed. Omit for no upper limit.

cronConfig.description: Cron job configuration for scheduling agent tasks.

expression.description: Cron expression (5 or 6 fields). Uses croniter-compatible syntax.

file.description: Custom cron file path relative to .github/agents/cron/. Defaults to <role>.cron if absent.

versionConfig.description: Version information for the conductor configuration.

description.description: Brief description of this configuration version.

date.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this version was created or updated.

notes.description: Additional notes or changelog for this version.
